creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-06-21 01:35:40 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia/lives     Makefile 
    multimedia/mjpegtools-yuvfilters Makefile 
    multimedia/y4mscaler Makefile 
    multimedia/mjpegtools Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    multimedia/mjpegtools/files patch-mplex_main.cpp 
  Removed files:
    multimedia/mjpegtools/files patch-gcc41 
                                patch-lavtools_lav_io.c 
  Log:
  [patch] multimedia/mjpegtools - update to 1.9rc1
  
          The current mjpegtools (mpeg2enc for example) is dumping core way
          too often to be able to do useful media conversions.
  
          This version has been running on my system for two weeks now and
          it works much better.
  
  portrevision bump for multimedia/lives multimedia/mjpegtools-yuvfilters
  multimedia/y4mscaler since they have LIB_DEPENDS on this port. Other
  ports having RUN_DEPENDS on this port are not bumped.
  
  PR:             ports/113878
  Submitted by:   Edwin Groothuis <edwin@mavetju.org>
  Approved by:    Michael Johnson <ahze@ahze.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.12      +2 -2      ports/multimedia/lives/Makefile
  1.8       +2 -2      ports/multimedia/mjpegtools-yuvfilters/Makefile
  1.59      +1 -2      ports/multimedia/mjpegtools/Makefile
  1.8       +3 -3      ports/multimedia/mjpegtools/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/multimedia/mjpegtools/files/patch-gcc41 (dead)
  1.2       +0 -18     ports/multimedia/mjpegtools/files/patch-lavtools_lav_io.c (dead)
  1.2       +27 -23    ports/multimedia/mjpegtools/files/patch-mplex_main.cpp
  1.17      +17 -12    ports/multimedia/mjpegtools/pkg-plist
  1.12      +2 -2      ports/multimedia/y4mscaler/Makefile
